precise.tooltip.hint: Type "Help" in command mode for more information
precise.error.no_params: The "%s" command does not take any parameters
precise.help.help.2: Displays information about the specified command.
precise.help.rx.2: Rotates the contraption by the specified angle clockwise around its §6local X-axis§7 (Viewed from §6+X§7)
precise.help.ry.2: Rotates the contraption by the specified angle clockwise around its §6local Y-axis§7 (Viewed from §6-Y§7)
precise.help.rz.2: Rotates the contraption by the specified angle clockwise around its §6local Z-axis§7 (Viewed from §6+Z§7)
precise.help.r.2: Rotates the contraption by the specified angle clockwise (§6Camera relative§7)
precise.help.grid.2: Snaps the contraption to the §6block grid§7
precise.help.grid.4: §fNote: §eG§7 is a shortcut for this command
precise.help.x.2: Moves the contraption by the specified distance forward (positive) or backward (negative) along the §6world x-axis§7
precise.help.y.2: Moves the contraption by the specified distance upward (positive) or downward (negative) along the §6world y-axis§7
precise.help.z.2: Moves the contraption by the specified distance forward (positive) or backward (negative) along the §6world z-axis§7
precise.help.w.2: Moves the contraption by the specified distance forward along the §6world axis§7 closest to the player's looking direction
precise.help.w.4: §fNote: §eW/A/S/D§7 commands only supports moving horizontally. To move vertically, use the §eY§7 command
precise.help.a.2: Moves the contraption by the specified distance left along the §6world axis§7 closest to the player's looking direction
precise.help.a.4: §fNote: §eW/A/S/D§7 commands only supports moving horizontally. To move vertically, use the §eY§7 command
precise.help.s.2: Moves the contraption by the specified distance backward along the §6world axis§7 closest to the player's looking direction
precise.help.s.4: §fNote: §eW/A/S/D§7 commands only supports moving horizontally. To move vertically, use the §eY§7 command
precise.help.d.2: Moves the contraption by the specified distance right along the §6world axis§7 closest to the player's looking direction
precise.help.d.4: §fNote: §eW/A/S/D§7 commands only supports moving horizontally. To move vertically, use the §eY§7 command
